calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar Jun-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:45 am and concluding at 9:55 am.

Plaintiff American Express National Bank is present represented by Kambrie Keith, Esq.
Defendant Richard McLeod is not present.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

ROBERT REBHAN is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff American Express National Bank, and against Defendant Richard McLeod aka Richard J McLeod, as follows:

1. Damages: $54,131.69
2. Costs: $563.95

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $54,695.64

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
